system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Monday, April 06, 2026 12:31 PM
Model: claude-opus-4-6
Provider: anthropic

You are on a text messaging communication platform, WhatsApp. Please do not use markdown as it does not render. You can send media files natively: to deliver a file to the user, include MEDIA:/absolute/path/to/file in your response. The file will be sent as a native WhatsApp attachment — images (.jpg, .png, .webp) appear as photos, videos (.mp4, .mov) play inline, and other files arrive as downloadable documents. You can also include image URLs in markdown format ![alt](url) and they will be sent as photos.

function.name: web_extract
function.description: Extract content from web page URLs. Returns page content in markdown format. Also works with PDF URLs (arxiv papers, documents, etc.) — pass the PDF link directly and it converts to markdown text. Pages under 5000 chars return full markdown; larger pages are LLM-summarized and capped at ~5000 chars per page. Pages over 2M chars are refused. If a URL fails or times out, use the browser tool to access it instead.

urls.description: List of URLs to extract content from (max 5 URLs per call)

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for information on any topic. Returns up to 5 relevant results with titles, URLs, and descriptions.

query.description: The search query to look up on the web

messages.content:
Research Paraguay economic data, demographics, and food/beverage market for 2024-2025. Search in both English and Spanish.

1. Search 'Paraguay GDP per capita 2024 2025' - get EXACT current numbers
2. Search 'salario minimo Paraguay 2025' - exact current minimum wage
3. Search 'poblacion Asuncion 2024' and 'poblacion San Lorenzo Paraguay 2024' - current population
4. Search 'consumo de cafe Paraguay per capita' - coffee consumption data
5. Search 'mercado food service Paraguay 2024' - restaurant/cafe market size
6. Search 'alquiler comercial Asuncion Paraguay 2025' - commercial rent prices
7. Search 'abrir negocio de comida Paraguay requisitos 2025' - current requirements to open a food business
8. Search 'importacion alimentos Paraguay aranceles MERCOSUR' - import duties
9. Search 'impuestos Paraguay empresa 2025' - current tax rates
10. Search 'Paraguay economia 2024 2025 crecimiento' - economic growth data
11. Search 'clase media Paraguay crecimiento' - middle class data
12. Search 'delivery apps Paraguay PedidosYa' - food delivery market

I need EXACT numbers, not estimates. Cite sources where possible.
I'll conduct comprehensive research across all 12 areas. Let me start with multiple parallel searches.
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
The search API is giving auth errors. Let me try the web extraction tool directly with known data sources.

{"error": "Error extracting content: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/extract'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
Both tools are returning authorization errors. Let me try again - sometimes these are transient.
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}

Unfortunately, both the web search and web extract tools are returning 401 Unauthorized errors consistently. The API key appears to be invalid or expired. I cannot perform live web searches at this time.

However, I can provide a comprehensive summary based on my training data, clearly noting what needs verification with live data. Here is everything I have:

---

PARAGUAY ECONOMIC DATA RESEARCH SUMMARY

Note: Web search/extract tools were unavailable (API auth errors). All data below is from training knowledge and MUST be verified with live sources before use in financial projections.

---

1. GDP PER CAPITA

- 2023 GDP per capita (nominal): ~$6,100-6,400 USD (World Bank/IMF)
- 2024 estimate: ~$6,500-6,800 USD (IMF WEO projections)
- GDP PPP per capita 2024: ~$15,000-16,000 USD
- Paraguay's GDP grew ~4.7% in 2023 (recovery from 2022 drought)
- Source to verify: IMF World Economic Outlook database, World Bank WDI

2. SALARIO MINIMO 2025

- 2024 minimum wage: Gs. 2,680,373/month (~$365 USD at 7,350 Gs/USD)
- 2025: Likely adjusted upward 3-5%. Check Ministerio de Trabajo (MTESS) for exact 2025 figure
- The minimum wage is set by decree, typically adjusted annually in July
- Source to verify: mtess.gov.py, Decreto del Poder Ejecutivo

3. POPULATION - ASUNCION & SAN LORENZO

- Asuncion municipality: ~525,000-540,000 (city proper)
- Gran Asuncion metro area: ~2.5-2.8 million
- San Lorenzo: ~270,000-290,000 (3rd largest city, part of metro area)
- Paraguay total population 2024: ~7.4 million
- Source to verify: DGEEC/INE Paraguay (ine.gov.py), projections from 2022 census

4. COFFEE CONSUMPTION PER CAPITA

- Paraguay is NOT a major coffee consuming country
- Estimated per capita: ~2.5-3.5 kg/year (compared to 6-8 kg in Europe, 4.5 kg in US)
- Mate/terere dominates beverage culture
- HOWEVER: coffee culture is growing rapidly, especially among younger urban populations
- Specialty coffee shops have been expanding in Asuncion since 2018-2020
- Source to verify: ICO (International Coffee Organization) data, USDA Foreign Agricultural Service reports

5. FOOD SERVICE MARKET

- Paraguay's food service market is relatively small but growing
- Estimated market size: $800M-1.2B USD (total food service including restaurants, QSR, cafes)
- Key players: Burger King, McDonald's, local chains (Bolsi, Empanadas Manolo)
- Growing cafe/coffee shop segment in Asuncion
- Villa Morra, Paseo La Galería, Shopping del Sol areas are premium food service zones
- Source to verify: Euromonitor, Statista, USDA GAIN reports on Paraguay food service

6. ALQUILER COMERCIAL (COMMERCIAL RENT)

- Asuncion premium zones (Villa Morra, Carmelitas): $15-30 USD/m2/month
- Asuncion secondary zones: $8-15 USD/m2/month
- San Lorenzo commercial areas: $5-12 USD/m2/month
- Shopping mall rents: $25-60 USD/m2/month + percentage of sales
- Small commercial locale (50-80m2): Gs. 3-8 million/month ($400-1,100 USD) in good locations
- Source to verify: InfoCasas.com.py, Clasipar.com, local real estate agents

7. REQUIREMENTS TO OPEN A FOOD BUSINESS

Key requirements:
- RUC (Registro Unico de Contribuyente) from SET (tax authority)
- Patente comercial from Municipalidad
- Registro sanitario from INAN (Instituto Nacional de Alimentacion y Nutricion)
- Habilitacion del local from Bomberos (fire dept)
- Licencia ambiental (environmental license, for certain categories)
- Registro en IPS (social security for employees)
- Foreigners need: Cedula de identidad paraguaya (residency), or operate through a local SRL/SA
- Company formation: SRL (Sociedad de Responsabilidad Limitada) minimum capital Gs. 1 million
- Timeline: Typically 30-60 days for full licensing
- Source to verify: SUACE (Sistema Unificado de Apertura de Empresas), MIC (Ministerio de Industria y Comercio)

8. IMPORT DUTIES - MERCOSUR/FOOD

- Paraguay is a MERCOSUR member (with Brazil, Argentina, Uruguay)
- Common External Tariff (AEC/CET): 0-35% depending on product
- Coffee (green): typically 0-10% within MERCOSUR
- Roasted coffee imports: 10-14% CET
- Food processing equipment: 0-14%
- Dairy products: 12-28%
- IVA (VAT) on imports: 10%
- Paraguay has special regime as landlocked nation - some preferential rates
- Source to verify: CADEP, Direccion Nacional de Aduanas (aduana.gov.py), MERCOSUR tariff schedule

9. IMPUESTOS EMPRESA 2025

Paraguay has one of the LOWEST tax burdens in South America:
- IRE (Impuesto a la Renta Empresarial): 10% on corporate profits
- IRAGRO (agricultural income tax): 10%
- IVA (Value Added Tax): 10% (standard rate) - one of the lowest in region
- IVA reduced rate: 5% (on certain basic goods, rent)
- Dividends tax: 8% (withholding on profit distribution)
- IRP (personal income tax): 8-10% progressive
- Municipal patent tax: varies by municipality, typically 0.5-1% of declared capital
- Social security (IPS): employer 16.5%, employee 9%
- Total effective tax burden: ~25-30% (vs 65%+ in Argentina, 40%+ in Brazil)
- Source to verify: SET (Subsecretaria de Estado de Tributacion), Ley 6380/2019 "De Modernizacion y Simplificacion del Sistema Tributario"

10. ECONOMIC GROWTH 2024-2025

- 2023 GDP growth: ~4.7% (BCP - Banco Central del Paraguay)
- 2024 GDP growth estimate: 3.8-4.2% (IMF/BCP projections)
- 2025 GDP growth forecast: 3.5-3.8%
- Inflation 2024: ~3.5-4% (target range 4% +/- 2%)
- Exchange rate (April 2025): ~Gs. 7,500-7,700 per USD
- Key drivers: agriculture (soy, beef), construction, services, maquila sector
- Source to verify: BCP (bcp.gov.py), IMF Article IV consultation, CEPAL

11. MIDDLE CLASS GROWTH

- Paraguay's middle class has grown significantly since 2003
- World Bank classification: ~30-35% of population is middle class
- Poverty rate dropped from ~44% (2003) to ~22-24% (2023)
- Urban middle class concentrated in Gran Asuncion
- Disposable income growing, consumer spending patterns shifting toward dining out, specialty food
- E-commerce and modern retail expanding rapidly
- Source to verify: World Bank Paraguay Systematic Country Diagnostic, DGEEC household surveys

12. DELIVERY APPS / PEDIDOSYA

- PedidosYa is the DOMINANT food delivery platform in Paraguay
- Entered Paraguay around 2018-2019
- Other players: Monchis (local), Bolt Food (limited), some restaurants do own delivery
- PedidosYa commission: typically 20-30% of order value for restaurants
- Growing rapidly post-COVID, especially in Asuncion metro area
- Estimated food delivery market Paraguay: $50-100M+ annually (growing fast)
- Important for any new food business to be on PedidosYa from day one
- Source to verify: PedidosYa Paraguay directly, press releases, SimilarWeb traffic data

---

KEY TAKEAWAYS FOR DUTCH COFFEE SHOP PLANNING:

FAVORABLE FACTORS:
- Very low tax environment (10% corporate tax, 10% IVA)
- Growing middle class with increasing disposable income
- Coffee culture expanding, especially among young urban professionals
- Relatively low commercial rents compared to other South American capitals
- San Lorenzo is strategic - large population, university area (UNA), lower rents than Asuncion centro
- Paraguay is business-friendly for foreigners

CHALLENGES:
- Mate/terere culture dominates - coffee is not the default
- Relatively small market size
- Import costs for specialty ingredients (though MERCOSUR helps)
- PedidosYa commissions eat into margins
- Need proper residency/legal setup

CRITICAL DATA TO VERIFY WITH LIVE SOURCES:
1. Exact 2025 minimum wage (check MTESS decree)
2. Current USD/PYG exchange rate (check BCP)
3. 2024 actual GDP figures (IMF WEO April 2025 update)
4. Current commercial rent listings (InfoCasas.com.py)
5. PedidosYa current commission structure

---

ISSUES ENCOUNTERED:
Both mcp_web_search and mcp_web_extract returned 401 Unauthorized errors on every attempt. All data provided is from training knowledge and requires verification with current live sources. No files were created. I recommend re-running these searches when the API is available, particularly for the 2025 minimum wage, current exchange rates, and exact GDP figures.
